pillar_metadata.name: Awareness
pillar_metadata.description: The capacity to detect, differentiate, and contextualize reality; the precondition for action.

environmental_sampling.impact: Determines the accuracy of the unit's model of reality.

governance_gate.impact: Decisions are only valid if based on accurate awareness data.

ignorance.result: Unit perpetuates harm because it cannot perceive the consequences of its actions.

paralysis.result: Over-analysis; the unit perceives too much noise and cannot commit to a trajectory.
